title: sphaeranthus greenwayi
intro: Sphaeranthus greenwayi, also known as the Greenway's buttonbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and promoting wound healing. Sphaeranthus greenwayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
